de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.scripts

Class ProofAlreadyClosedException

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Throwable
      • java.lang.Exception
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.scripts.ScriptException
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.scripts.ProofAlreadyClosedException
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    HasLocation, java.io.Serializable

    public class ProofAlreadyClosedException
extends ScriptException
    Thrown if during the execution of a command, the proof is already closed. May or may not lead to exceptional termination of the whole script based on the @failonclosed setting.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
